# To re-render manually (from cyrillic-reference/):
#   glyphplotter --input glyphplotter/Serif/variants/F50C.cv.txt \
#                --output svg/Serif/variants/F50C.cv.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-serif-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ------- unicode box
strokeWidth 20 # for unicode box
strokeColor 9E9E9E # gray
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
# ------- glyph: Ҫ
comment "Cyrillic Capital Letter Es With Descender uni04AA"
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 378 0 /uni04AA
# ------- unicode label
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+04AA"
move 1400

# ------- Arrow sign
strokeDash 0 0
strokeWidth 80 # for plus and arrow signs
strokeColor 9E9E9E # gray
drawArrow pen 350 250 1000 250 closed60
move 1200

# ------- unicode box
strokeWidth 20 # for unicode box
strokeColor 9E9E9E # gray
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
# ------- glyph: Ҫ (variant uni04AA.CHU)
comment "Cyrillic Capital Letter Es With Descender uni04AA variant uni04AA.CHU"
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 378 0 /uni04AA.CHU
# ------- unicode label
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+04AA"
move 1400
